description: AWS-specific context extensions. Merged on top of context-contracts.json at runtime by context_provider.py. Live-state fields (vpc_mapping, load_balancers, api_gateway, irsa_bindings) retired per live-state-audit.json (B1 M1.a). Those fields are scanner-populated via store API in B2+, not stored as section_schemas. aws_accounts kept as semi-static metadata (account IDs are stable).

aws_accounts._description: AWS account IDs by environment. Semi-static metadata: account IDs are stable and do not require API calls to discover. Belongs in clusters/integrations table metadata.
